face.structure: oval with subtly defined cheekbones, a slender jawline that gives a balanced appearance

eyes.color: warm hazel with flecks of gold

face.expression: slightly furrowed brows with a thoughtful, intensely observant look

skin.texture: smooth with a few natural freckles across the nose
skin.rendering_notes: applies soft gradient shading, mild reflective highlights on high points

hair.color: deep chestnut brown with subtle auburn highlights
hair.style: straight and sleek, reaches just past the shoulders
hair.flow: slight inward curve at the ends
details: occasional loose strands framing the face

character.aura: a silent storm, charged yet concealed, always assessing and pondering

outfit.base: slim-fit, structured blazer over a plain white blouse
outfit.fit: tailored to fit snugly, allowing agile movement

composition.framing: mid-length portrait capturing from hips upwards
composition.pose: slightly turned to the side, one arm across the body holding the opposite elbow
composition.gesture: gaze directed sideways as if looking past the viewer, fingers curled around the elbow

background.color_palette: muted blues and grays with occasional soft yellow lights
background.details: blurred outlines of skyscrapers and city lights to indicate depth and activity
background.rules: ensure a slightly out-of-focus effect on background to keep character as focal point
